title: eslint-plugin-react@6.7.1 breaks build 🚨
body:
Hello lovely humans, [eslint-plugin-react](https://www.npmjs.com/package/eslint-plugin-react) just published its new version 6.7.1.
State Failing tests :rotating_light:
Dependency eslint-plugin-react
New version 6.7.1
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build went from success to failure**. As eslint-plugin-react is “only” a devDependency of this project it **might not break production or downstream projects**, but “only” your build or test tools – **preventing new deploys or publishes**. I recommend you give this issue a high priority. I’m sure you can resolve this :muscle: Of course this could just be a false positive, caused by a flaky test suite, or third parties that are currently broken or unavailable, but that would be another problem I’d recommend working on. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- [GitHub Release](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/releases/tag/v6.7.1)

Fixed

  • Fix jsx-tag-spacing crash when options object isn't passed (#955 @daltones)
--- The new version differs by 22 commits . - [`af323d5`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/af323d55cde75d536a96a99688808626613dec09) Update CHANGELOG and bump version - [`c537015`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/c537015e328bbe012915867bf93fd50c1f2ff352) Add additional test for jsx-tag-spacing - [`6da5807`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/6da5807218b97b4924c938d5bb0ce8356b98dfa8) Fix jsx-tag-spacing crash when options object isn't passed (fixes #955) - [`de9a357`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/de9a357c57768020b855883797a8db66b817770b) Fix `jsx-tag-spacing` crash when options object isn't passed - [`5952dbf`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/5952dbf2d17cc02f885f657f8cb9d00aa53869f1) Update CHANGELOG and bump version - [`17acf24`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/17acf242fa32973e67062212a2dd3f8c06611d1f) Update dependencies - [`874a3e3`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/874a3e329f4410f6fa6f0a71d8dccc02ea453647) Fix jsx-wrap-multilines ternaries handling (fixes #916) - [`fe5594b`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/fe5594bd5264e939924552e6403a4e171793f40f) Fix no-danger-with-children crash with spread on global variables (fixes #921) - [`1df6118`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/1df61185f289daec908f5f21b96e13b01d7a7e9a) Merge pull request #953 from everdimension/default-skipshapeprops-enable - [`9921674`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/99216742bc4acb28eaee318c403310cb67d0b47c) Fix some links in CHANGELOG - [`231acd9`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/231acd9cff67248509c243a24261189851c0e7af) Fix jsx-indent for arrays in jsx (fixes #947) - [`40882e5`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/40882e57cb9f0a709788e6ef85b8c8bc9d59033f) Add more test to jsx-indent for multiline ternaries - [`2fb1d37`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/2fb1d37700092e117b292325bb1958fb30103877) Fix jsx-indent on multiline ternary - [`e60921c`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/e60921c89febbbc093095b0546f91195149b830d) Fix jsx-indent for parenthesized ternary (fixes #945) - [`2cd6e91`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/2cd6e916a669d3601868a1122f0ae3d61ff473a4) skipShapeProps should be enabled by default until it works properly; There are 22 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/compare/cad882b6f9dbb13987785a9f51229b721cce4ea6...af323d55cde75d536a96a99688808626613dec09). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
